title: SpoornLoot
description: Loot, weapons, tools, armor, swords with random elements for fun
body:
![Swords display](https://i.imgur.com/6uODrKT.png)


## Information

The vision for this mod is to add weapons/armor/tools or loot in general that may scale with the player's achievements/difficulty, but also have a random element to them for fun.  


 

 

### Features
**Configurable:**

- Spawn rate for swords in loot chests
- Chance that a spawned sword will have:
  - Lightning Affinity
  - Crit chance
  - Fire damage
**Weapons**
- 9 new swords
- Crit chance
- Crit damage
- Lightning swords
- Fire damage
 

### Dependencies
This mod requires:

- Cloth Config API - https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cloth-config
- Fabric API - https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fabric-api
